entry.title: New: RES25-312 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND TUITION, VALUED AT $3,100, TO THE CITY FROM THE HONOLULU ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY FOR A REPRESENTATIVE OF THE HONOLULU ZOO TO ATTEND THE ZOO HOOF STOCK TRIM PROGRAM LEVEL 2 COURSE IN COLUMBUS, OHIO, FROM MARCH 9-11, 2026.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
